production_value_basis: BOI reports Thailand E&E output of USD 97.94B in 2023; electronics is estimated as 54% of E&E output.
chip_share_basis: High semiconductor intensity: electronics includes ICs, PCB-related products, HDDs and semiconductor devices; base share is an analytical estimate with sensitivity range.
confidence_level: High for production value; Medium for chip share
suitability: Suitable for Revenue-at-Risk model as the broad electronics sector has direct semiconductor dependence.
notes: Largest absolute exposure because the sector combines large output with high chip intensity.

production_value_basis: Reuters reports Thailand automotive sector around USD 53B; BOI/industry data also show Thailand as a major vehicle production base.
chip_share_basis: Semiconductor share based on vehicle BOM benchmark; conservative for Thailand because ICE and pickup production dominate relative to high-end EVs.
suitability: Suitable as a conservative base case; important bottleneck risk even when chip cost share is not high.
notes: Strategically important because missing low-cost chips can stop production of high-value vehicles.

production_value_basis: Proxy derived from BOI E&E data and computer parts/components share; Thailand is a major HDD exporter.
chip_share_basis: HDDs use controller ICs, read-channel chips, motor control and PCB electronics, but are also electromechanical products.
suitability: Use as a proxy estimate; suitable with clear limitations and sensitivity analysis.
notes: High criticality but lower absolute exposure than broad electronics due to smaller estimated production base.

production_value_basis: Proxy based on OIE 2024 electrical appliances export value including air conditioners, washing machines, refrigerators and related products.
chip_share_basis: Appliances use control boards, sensors, inverter modules and power electronics; major costs still include compressors, motors, metal and plastics.
suitability: Use as lower-bound proxy; better data would separate appliance production value from exports.
notes: Lower chip intensity but meaningful exposure due to large appliance export base.
